{{Quote|The ability to manipulate the Force may be unusual, but it is not unique. Given time and the proper chemistry, almost anyone can learn how to tap into the power of the Force and move small objects or influence weak minds. But this is not the way of the Jedi. The decision to use such powers for the betterment of all, and not for selfish purposes, distinguishes the Jedi from all others.|Sar Agorn|<ref name="JVS" />}}
'''Sar Agorn''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and the early [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. He was an amorphous, blob-like [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] whose form was constantly surrounded in green gases.

==Biography==
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Gender/Legends|male]], Sar Agorn was of a rare species of amorphous, blob-like [[Sentience/Legends|sentients]] whose form was constantly surrounded in green gases<ref name="Power of the Jedi Sourcebook">''[[Power of the Jedi Sourcebook]]''</ref> [[Jedi training/Legends|Training]] as a member of the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] on [[Ossus/Legends|Ossus]] some [[25,000 BBY/Legends|500 years]] before the [[First Great Schism]], Agorn attained the rank of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Master]] and studied as a [[Jedi Consular]], becoming a resource on the early history of the Order and their roots on [[Tython/Legends|Tython]] which had been abandoned over seven centuries prior. During Agorn's life he trained [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Cope Shykrill]], a [[Selonian/Legends|Selonian]] prodigy strong in [[Telekinesis/Legends|telekinesis]]. During Shykrill's training, the boy fell to the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side of the Force]]; though Agorn was unaware of this until the murder of three other Padawans. While Shykrill made it appear that he was one of the victims, Agorn and his contemporary [[Nuck Lyu]] realized the truth and released Shykrill from the dark side's grip by killing him.<ref name="JVS" />

One of Agorn's lasting contributions to the Jedi Order was his keeping of a [[Sar Agorn's holocron|personal holocron]] which would later be recovered long after his death. As his personality served as [[Gatekeeper/Legends|gatekeeper]], many assumed that his image was that of a degraded image, but scans proved that the confusion stemmed from viewers' unfamiliarity with Agorn's rare species. Agorn's personality was also preserved as a Gatekeeper for the [[Great Holocron/Legends|Great Holocron]] to teach about the early Order's history and interactions with the dark side.<ref name="JVS" />
